ksa_text: Knowledge of data asset management principles and practices, including data discovery, asset inventory and cataloging, ownership assignment, lifecycle tracking, and value assessment of data assets.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-016 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4245 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.425, ddat=0.417, dcwf=0.407) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4245 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-K-016 (composite 0.4245) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4245 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Financial Risk Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4245 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4245, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
